page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: FOCUS is an innovative and agile model to profile and report organisms present in metagenomic samples based on composition usage without sequence length dependencies.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: FOCUS (Find Organisms by Composition Usage) is an agile profiler for metagenomic data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FOCUS (Find Organisms by Composition Usage) is an agile profiler for metagenomic data.
